timeline.label: NYSE IPO via merger with Far Peak Acquisition Corp; begins public reporting as BLSH
Closed CCData acquisition to expand CoinDesk Data analytics and index inputs
Amended loan agreement with SPV KY Limited (block.one assignee); related-party debt ~$491M at year-end 2024
SEC SAB 122 rescinds SAB 121; Bullish applies IAS 37 for customer digital asset safeguard obligations
CoinDesk acquisition integrated with Bullish Exchange cross-sell (indices, events, liquidity services)
Bullish founded with block.one backing; EOS/blockchain industry lineage
block.one SEC settlement on unregistered token distribution (disclosed as reputational risk for Bullish)

industry.structure: Centralized crypto exchanges are oligopolistic globally (Binance, Coinbase, OKX) with regional regulated entrants; Bullish targets institutional flow with integrated AMMI and CoinDesk media/data.
industry.share_shift: Institutional share moving toward regulated venues and index/data bundles; DeFi captures retail flow; Bullish gains via CoinDesk indices licensing and exchange cross-listings.
industry.trend: Spot and derivatives volume tied to crypto volatility; stablecoin collateral and portfolio margin rising; media/data monetization diversifies pure spread economics.
